description: Supportive care actions available during the appendicitis encounter. Accessible via Icon 9 (Other Treatments menu) or via quick-access IV and O2 icons on the main UI.

quick_access_icons.description: IV and O2 icons are always visible on the main encounter UI as shortcuts. They trigger the identical action and cost as using the Other Treatments menu.

icons.label: IV
icons.description: Shortcut to establish IV access. Same effect and cost as using Other Treatments menu.

icons.label: O2
icons.description: Shortcut to start supplemental oxygen. Same effect and cost as using Other Treatments menu.

auto_bed_triggers.description: Patient automatically transitions to hospital bed sprite when any of these conditions are met. No player action required.

iv_without_access_popup.description: If player attempts to order an IV medication without IV access established, this popup fires.
iv_without_access_popup.popup_text_normal: You haven't placed an IV yet. Giving this medication will require IV access first. Total cost: {med_ap} AP (medication) + 1 AP (IV access). Proceed?
iv_without_access_popup.popup_text_difficult_stick: IV access is proving difficult. Giving this medication will require IV access first. Total cost: {med_ap} AP (medication) + 2 AP (IV access). Proceed?
iv_without_access_popup.note: IV placed via this popup never earns a bonus point regardless of patient state.

treatments.name: IV Access

bonus_points.note: Bonus point only awarded when IV is placed proactively before septic shock. Never awarded via popup regardless of timing.

infiltration_check.infiltration_popup_text: The IV has infiltrated. A new line is needed.

treatments.repeat_note: Can be re-placed after infiltration if Difficult Stick badge is active.

treatments.name: Supplemental Oxygen
treatments.description: Apply supplemental oxygen via nasal cannula.

effects.clinical_note: Appropriate supportive care. No direct effect on appendicitis progression.

treatments.name: NPO (Nothing by Mouth)
treatments.description: Make the patient NPO in preparation for surgery.

bonus_points.note: Bonus point only awarded when NPO is ordered before septic shock state.

treatments.name: Foley Catheter
treatments.description: Insert urinary catheter for urine output monitoring.

effects.clinical_note: Appropriate for monitoring in septic shock. No direct effect on progression.

treatments.name: NG Tube (Nasogastric Tube)
treatments.description: Insert nasogastric tube for gastric decompression.

effects.clinical_note: Appropriate for bowel rest and decompression.
Standard safety measure. No direct effect on progression.

treatments.name: Strict I&Os
treatments.description: Begin strict intake and output monitoring.

effects.clinical_note: Appropriate for monitoring fluid status, especially in septic shock.
